rationale: Educ. Code §30.004 governs school district disclosure of state institution program information to parents. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: Each school district shall provide each parent or other person having lawful control of a student with written information about:
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Educ. Code §30.004 program information requirements.
